div.style: font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; border-left: 2px solid black; border-top: 2px solid black; border-bottom: 2px solid black; border-right: 2px dashed black;

th.span: Maintenance Charges for the Month of

div.span: New City Housing Project Collection Account After

span.style: text-decoration: underline; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px;

li.span: For any queries and complains contact this No: +923171112642/+92346-1420413
For Arears and other details Please contact & visit Accounts office
If due amount exceeds than Rs 8000 (Current Bill + Arrears) all the services will be discontinued and action shall be taken according to society policy.
Please share your payment screenshots only on this number: +923171112642.

div.style: font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; border-left: None; border-top: 2px solid black; border-bottom: 2px solid black; border-right: 2px dashed black;

th.span: Maintenance Charges for the Month of

div.span: New City Housing Project Collection Account After

span.style: text-decoration: underline; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px;

li.span: For any queries and complains contact this No: +923171112642/+92346-1420413
For Arears and other details Please contact & visit Accounts office
Fine of 500 Rupees will be imposed after the Due date in case of non payment.
Collection center: 2nd Floor, Paradise Office, New City Arcade.
